title: digitalis ciliata
intro: Digitalis ciliata, also known as the fringed foxglove, is a plant species in the family Plantaginaceae. This plant contains compounds similar to those found in the foxglove plant, which has been used for centuries in traditional medicine. The medicinal properties of Digitalis ciliata include its ability to stimulate the heart and increase blood flow, making it useful in treating conditions such as heart failure and arrhythmias. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tinctures and infusions, are used to treat a range of health issues, including high blood pressure and chest pain, although its use should be closely monitored by a healthcare professional due to potential toxicity.
